name: anime-aggressors
description: Shōnen-inspired platform fighter with rollback-first simulation and optional Edge-IO wearables

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run typecheck -w @anime-aggressors/game-core -w @anime-aggressors/rollback -w @anime-aggressors/edgeio -w @anime-aggressors/messages -w @gunnch/input -w anime-aggressors-web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run test -w @anime-aggressors/game-core -w @anime-aggressors/rollback -w @anime-aggressors/edgeio
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
